title: nasturtium obtusulum
intro: Nasturtium obtusulum, a species of flowering plant in the cress family, is also known as the narrow-leafed nasturtium or Indian cress. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and coughs. The health benefits of nasturtium obtusulum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Nasturtium obtusulum can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, and it can also be used as a fresh addition to salads and sandwiches.
